note: Icon set for an alternate-app-icon picker. Free icons ship with the app; Pro icons gate behind the paid plan.

icons.name: Original
icons.tagline: The OG muffin — warm, golden, and ready to boot up your library.

icons.name: Dark Mode
icons.tagline: Same muffin, midnight batter — easy on the eyes for late-night sessions.

icons.name: Happy
icons.tagline: Frosted, sprinkled, and cherry-topped — dessert mode activated.

icons.name: Retro Console
icons.tagline: Blocky and pixel-perfect, just like the games it's about to emulate.

icons.name: Mint Matcha
icons.tagline: Green tea batter, red bean sprinkles — chill vibes only.

icons.name: Blueberry Blast
icons.tagline: Loaded with extra blueberries, because more is more.

icons.name: Strawberry
icons.tagline: Pale pink batter dotted with ripe strawberries. Sweet and simple.

icons.name: Double Chocolate
icons.tagline: All-chocolate everything, for players who like their icon as rich as their save files.

icons.name: Lemon Zest
icons.tagline: Bright, citrusy, and a little zesty, with poppy-seed sprinkles.

icons.name: Neon Cyber
icons.tagline: A glowing cyan outline on a midnight backdrop for late-night hacker energy.

icons.name: Pumpkin Spice
icons.tagline: Autumn muffin, everything-spice season, no notes.

icons.name: Holiday Frost
icons.tagline: Frosted top and a tiny Santa hat — festive without trying too hard.

icons.name: Spooky Halloween
icons.tagline: Bat wings, glowing eyes, and a grumpy little frown. Trick or emulate.

icons.name: Rainbow Pride
icons.tagline: Classic six-stripe rainbow behind a muffin covered in colorful sprinkles.

icons.name: Summer Beach
icons.tagline: Sunglasses on, sun's out. Beach day for your home screen.

icons.name: Galaxy Space
icons.tagline: A starry night sky with a ringed planet standing in for a blueberry.

icons.name: Progress Pride
icons.tagline: The full Progress flag arcs behind the muffin, heart-topped and proud.

icons.name: Transgender Pride
icons.tagline: Trans flag stripes with blue-and-pink sprinkles on one happy muffin.

icons.name: Equality
icons.tagline: A simple blue background and a gold equals sign. Says it all.

icons.name: Fix the World
icons.tagline: Muffin-as-Earth with a healing heart on top. Small gesture, big message.

icons.name: Autism Muffin
icons.tagline: The official rainbow infinity symbol arcs behind the muffin like a badge.
icons.note: embeds specials/assets/autism-infinity-official.png (Brandon's official asset) via <image href> — that file must ship alongside the SVG, it is not self-contained. y-position was tuned so the loop's crossing clears the muffin's head instead of hiding behind it.

icons.name: ADHD Awareness
icons.tagline: A little lightning bolt for a very fast brain.

icons.name: AuDHD Awareness
icons.tagline: Infinity loop plus lightning bolt. Both, at once, all the time.

icons.name: Disability Pride
icons.tagline: Diagonal flag stripes on charcoal, muffin front and center.

icons.name: Mental Health Pride
icons.tagline: The semicolon — your story isn't over.

icons.name: Lesbian Pride
icons.tagline: Sunset-toned stripes with orange and pink sprinkles on top.

icons.name: Bisexual Pride
icons.tagline: Pink, purple, and blue. No notes needed.

icons.name: Nonbinary Pride
icons.tagline: Yellow, white, purple, black — clean and iconic.

icons.name: Gold VIP
icons.tagline: A tiny gold crown for a muffin that knows its worth.

icons.name: Holographic
icons.tagline: Pastel-shifting holo foil, because your home screen deserves main-character energy.

icons.name: Diamond Ice
icons.tagline: An ice-blue muffin dusted in gemstones. Cool under pressure.

notMigrated: mono-black and mono-white are stamp/watermark marks, not homescreen icon candidates — left out of the picker list on purpose
